tool_args.label: Capital Program Committee Meeting Book - September 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Capital Program Committee Meeting - September 2024. Metropolitan Transportation Authority. Document contains meeting agenda, minutes from July 29 2024, Traffic Light Report for Q2 2024, C&D Safety Report, Capital Program Commitments & Completions through August 2024, Capital Funding Status, and Procurement actions for September 2024.

payload.title: Capital Program Committee Meeting
payload.description: Capital Program Committee Meeting book for September 23, 2024, including meeting minutes, Q2 2024 Traffic Light Report, Safety Summary, Capital Program Commitments & Completions, Capital Funding Status, and Procurement actions.

issues: evidence_refs must include at least one source block
